name: rem
description: REM sleep for your Claude sessions — prune stale memory, crystallize learnings, maintain .claude/memory/ with timestamps and automatic eviction

interface.longDescription: REM sleep for Claude sessions — auto-prunes stale memory on session start, crystallizes learnings on session stop, maintains .claude/memory/ with timestamps and 90-day eviction.
